hooks.command: if [ -d apps ] && [ -d packages ]; then missing=''; [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ] && missing="$missing root/CLAUDE.md"; [ ! -f apps/mobile/CLAUDE.md ] && missing="$missing apps/mobile/CLAUDE.md"; [ ! -f apps/web/CLAUDE.md ] && missing="$missing apps/web/CLAUDE.md"; [ ! -f packages/CLAUDE.md ] && missing="$missing packages/CLAUDE.md"; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then echo "[TechNest] Missing AI rules:$missing — run /setup-rules to deploy them."; fi; fi
